items.question: How does it work?
items.answer: Our generator uses a multi-stage pipeline to turn text into high-quality audio. It first analyzes your description to capture traits like intensity, character, and duration. That information goes through neural networks trained for shriek and vocal synthesis. Trained on professional samples, the AI produces natural-sounding scream loud and loud screams. Filtering and post-processing keep quality high and ensure every vocal sound effect clip meets broadcast standards.

items.question: How do I write effective prompts for it?
items.answer: Write clear, specific descriptions. Try "man angry loud" or "loud female scream" for scream loud. Include intensity, character type, and context.
